Video.summary: Megan Fudge and Karin Kochis take on Ryann Foster and Lee Whitwell in this Women's Split Pro Doubles semifinal match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Split Pro Doubles - Semifinal

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Split Pro Doubles - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Split Pro Doubles - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Split Pro Doubles - Semifinal

Video.summary: The penultimate day of World Pickleball League Season 2 heats up at Mumbai’s Jio World Garden with a high-stakes rematch of last year's semifinals between the Hyderabad Superstars and the Bengaluru Jawans. The spotlight shines on a "mouthwatering" women's singles clash between two unbeaten titans, Shawn Mendes and Katerina Stewart, where one historic winning streak is destined to end. From tactical mixed doubles experiments to the high-pressure debut of Eduardo Irizarry, every point is a desperate fight to stay "in the hunt" for a final spot. With commentators on the "edge of their seats" witnessing unbelievable defensive plays and "blistering" side outs, this tie is a masterclass in professional grit.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Bengaluru - Day 10 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Bengaluru - Day 10 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Bengaluru - Day 10 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Bengaluru - Day 10 Tie 1

Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Hyderabad - Day 6 Tie 2

WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Hyderabad - Day 6 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Hyderabad - Day 6 Tie 2

Video.summary: Welcome back to the 2025 Minto US Open Pickleball Championships for the Men's Pro Doubles semifinal match. This is a great representation of the sport's global growth, with the top-ranked player from India competing. The match features teams Munro and Yang against Bhatia and Mehta. The match is tightly contested, with the level of play stepping up as they enter the semi-finals. The caption file also notes that Bhatia's grandfather was a world-renowned cricketer in India with the nickname "the Sultan of Swing," which is comparable to an NFL star like Tom Brady.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta
US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta
US Open 2025 - Men's Pro Doubles - Munro/Yang vs. Bhatia/Mehta

Video.summary: We are live in sunny San Diego for Week 3 of the NCPA San Diego Regional 2025. This high-stakes collegiate team match features the University of San Diego (USD) battling Grand Canyon University (GCU) in a best-of-seven series.The action includes intense Men's Doubles , Women's Singles , and Mixed Doubles as these teams compete for regional dominance. Watch top talent, including GCU's lefty powerhouse Adam Jones, who boasts a strong 5.6 singles rating , and his partner Xavier Cook Nakakuki. On the USD side, the episode highlights the partnership of Marcus Hopkins and Ryan, an impressive grad student player with high doubles ratings. USD’s Bella also shows grit in the women's singles match. This broadcast captures the best of college pickleball in an amazing format.
Video.title: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - USD vs. GCU

Image.alt: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - USD vs. GCU
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - USD vs. GCU
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - USD vs. GCU

Image.alt: Women's Singles Final - Indiana vs. Clemson
Women's Singles Final - Indiana vs. Clemson
Women's Singles Final - Indiana vs. Clemson

Video.summary: It's the "Southern Derby" in the World Pickleball League (WPL) as Bengaluru takes on Chennai in the second tie of the day, live from the CCI Brabourne Stadium in Mumbai. The match features 48 players from six teams and 14 countries, with commentators detailing every crucial point.The tie begins with a thrilling Men's Singles match: Bengaluru's Blaskowitz (a Croatian talent) faces Chennai's Sobek (the Polish national champion). The commentators highlight the extreme patience and dinking skills demonstrated by both players, with Sobek's ability to keep the ball low being a key factor.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2

Video.summary: In this Pro Men's Doubles match from the 2025 Minto U.S. Open Pickleball Championships in Naples, Florida, the team of Yates and Sobex faces off against Yu and Zwiren. The match is characterized by powerful shots, strategic dinks, and a high-energy atmosphere on the custom-designed Championship court. Commentary highlights the players' transition from singles to doubles and features details about one of the players, Thomas Yu, who previously played tennis at Johns Hopkins University.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Yates/Sobex vs. Yu/Zwiren

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Yates/Sobex vs. Yu/Zwiren
US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Yates/Sobex vs. Yu/Zwiren
US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Yates/Sobex vs. Yu/Zwiren

Video.summary: Witness an unexpected and electrifying Mixed Pro Doubles showdown from the Minto US Open Pickleball Championships in Naples, Florida! Originally scheduled for a back court, this highly anticipated match featuring Andre Agassi and Anna Leigh Waters was moved to Championship Court due to overwhelming crowd demand, creating an unforgettable atmosphere. Relive every moment as these top players battle it out in a thrilling display of professional pickleball. Don't miss the action from East Naples Community Park – the epicenter of pickleball!
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang

Video.summary: Experience the excitement of the Mixed Split Pro Age pickleball match on Championship Court. This video features a unique pairing of new partners Schull and Endara, who are familiar with the heat and come from a grinding three-game win in their last match. They face off against the formidable Lee Whitwell and Kafka. With Lee Whitwell's impressive hands and athleticism, and Kafka's hard-hitting forehand and topspin drives, this is a matchup you won't want to miss. Get ready for incredible rallies and a display of top-tier pickleball as these pros battle it out.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Whitewell/Kawka vs. Schull/Endara

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Whitewell/Kawka vs. Schull/Endara
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Whitewell/Kawka vs. Schull/Endara
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Whitewell/Kawka vs. Schull/Endara
